headline: Is Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is HOOD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Robinhood Markets, Inc. on Darius Dark Investing’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on HOOD. Robinhood Markets, Inc.’s share was trading at $86.43 as of April 21st. HOOD’s trailing and forward P/E were 42.16 and 38.76, respectively according to […]

headline: Robinhood’s Trump Accounts Role Recasts Growth, Regulation And Crypto Ambitions
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has been selected as the initial trustee for new federally funded IRA accounts for minors, informally called "Trump Accounts". The program pairs with shifts in U.S. trading regulations, including the lifting of the Pattern Day Trader rule. Robinhood is also rolling out an international crypto offering alongside its expanded brokerage footprint. At a share price of $73.66, Robinhood sits at the center of a new mix of government partnership and global retail...

headline: Robinhood's Crypto Revenue Took a Hit. Is the Long-Term Story Still Intact?
summary: Robinhood saw its cryptocurrency revenue drop 47% year over year in the first quarter.
